import { Link, useNavigate, useLocation } from "react-router-dom"; import "../styles/Navbar.css"; function Navbar() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const location = useLocation(); const userInfo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("userInfo")); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem("userInfo"); navigate("/login"); window.location.reload(); }; const isActive = (path) => location.pathname === path ? "active" : ""; return (
🏏 CricStats 🏠 Home 📅 Matches 👥 Players 🛡️ Teams 📊 Standings 📈 Stats 🏆 Rankings ⚖️ Compare {userInfo && ( <> ➕ Add Match 👤 Add Player 🤖 Chat 📡 Sync )}
{userInfo ? ( <> {userInfo.isAdmin && ( Admin )} Hi, {userInfo.username} ) : ( <> Login Register )}
); } export default Navbar;
